creator: social@brandongrows.me
text:
Created attachment 249792
Improved port submission

Alright, this one is the one I'm submitting to be official. I hope to make this a dependency of Ren'py and keep it updated separately. I hope to make a python module of this too so that I can remove it completely from the main source's build. There's a fun bug related to it where this library upstream can break the FreeBSD build due to having CLRF (Windows style) newlines; when converting to Unix style ones, it can cause a build failure while the core developer has FreeBSD support in the newer versions (like what I have here).
